infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NotchField Track uses your location for GPS check-in/out and to stamp photos with coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NotchField Track uses background location for geofence auto check-in at job sites.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NotchField Track uses the camera for progress photos, QC documentation, and safety records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NotchField Track accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: NotchField Track uses background location for geofence auto check-in at job sites.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: NotchField Track uses your location for GPS check-in/out.

plugins.cameraPermission: NotchField Track uses the camera for progress photos and safety documentation.

plugins.photosPermission: NotchField Track accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to reports.
